title: Record soft41 async30 and tool3k densify

fixtureActions.content:
# Soft41 Async30 Tool3k Contract

## Soft 41
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.41 so full summaries start earlier under long sessions

## Async 30
async pre-rot and swarm micro pressure default to 0.30 so reclaim starts earlier

## Tool 3k
tool result budgets default to 3000 chars with 50-char previews for denser reclaim

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/status vitest
